items.title: Azteco
items.description: Azteco is a bitcoin voucher system for low-KYC onboarding. Buy a printed or digital voucher with cash or card, then redeem to any bitcoin address with no account registration.

items.title: Bitrefill
items.description: Bitrefill sells gift cards, mobile top-ups, and bill-pay vouchers for bitcoin and Lightning payments. It bridges the gap between the bitcoin economy and traditional retail.

items.title: Circular Economy
items.description: A Bitcoin circular economy is a local or digital ecosystem where participants earn, spend, and save bitcoin without converting back to fiat. The goal is to close the loop: merchants accept bitcoin, employees and suppliers are paid in bitcoin, and the community reinvests in bitcoin-native goods and services.

items.title: Fold
items.description: Fold is a bitcoin rewards company offering a debit card and app for earning sats-back on everyday purchases.

items.title: GetOnZero: Living on the Bitcoin Standard
items.description: A synthesis of Round Rock Bitcoiners meetups on the philosophy, acquisition, deployment, and spending of Bitcoin as primary money.

items.title: Peer-to-Peer Exchange
items.description: Peer-to-peer (P2P) exchanges allow individuals to buy and sell bitcoin directly with one another, without centralized intermediaries holding funds or requiring identity verification. This aligns with Bitcoin's cypherpunk roots: minimize trust, preserve privacy, and maintain self-custody.
